statement:
def b2_len {α : Type} : List α → Nat
| [] => 0
| _ :: xs => b2_len xs + 1

example {α : Type} (xs ys : List α) : b2_len (xs ++ ys) = b2_len xs + b2_len ys

metadata.selection_reason: custom recursive list function with arithmetic associativity step

statement:
def b2_map {α β : Type} (f : α → β) : List α → List β
| [] => []
| x :: xs => f x :: b2_map f xs

example {α β : Type} (f : α → β) (xs ys : List α) : b2_map f (xs ++ ys) = b2_map f xs ++ b2_map f ys

metadata.selection_reason: custom recursive map requires structural induction

statement:
def b2_sum : List Nat → Nat
| [] => 0
| x :: xs => x + b2_sum xs

example (xs ys : List Nat) : b2_sum (xs ++ ys) = b2_sum xs + b2_sum ys

metadata.selection_reason: custom recursive sum with append and Nat associativity

statement:
def b2_double : Nat → Nat
| 0 => 0
| n + 1 => b2_double n + 2

example (n : Nat) : b2_double n = n + n

metadata.selection_reason: custom recursion over Nat with successor arithmetic cleanup

statement:
def b2_add : Nat → Nat → Nat
| 0, m => m
| n + 1, m => b2_add n m + 1

example (n m : Nat) : b2_add n m = n + m

metadata.selection_reason: custom two-argument recursion with nontrivial successor normalization

statement: example (p q r s : Prop) : (p ∨ (q ∨ r)) ∨ s → (s ∨ r) ∨ (q ∨ p)

metadata.selection_reason: nested Or reshaping requires several case splits

statement:
example {α : Type} (fallback : α) (o : Option α) :
    (match o with | none => fallback | some x => x) = fallback ∨ ∃ x, o = some x

metadata.selection_reason: Option split with equality branch and witness branch

statement: example (a b : Bool) : (a && b = true) → (a = true ∧ b = true)

metadata.selection_reason: requires Boolean case analysis and hypothesis simplification

    (∃ x : α, ∀ y : β, r x y) → ∀ y : β, ∃ x : α, r x y

    a = b → b = c → c = d → f a = f d

statement:
def b2_all {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) : List α → Bool
| [] => true
| x :: xs => p x && b2_all p xs

example {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) (xs ys : List α) :
    b2_all p (xs ++ ys) = (b2_all p xs && b2_all p ys)

metadata.selection_reason: custom recursive Boolean fold with associativity cleanup

statement:
def b2_any {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) : List α → Bool
| [] => false
| x :: xs => p x || b2_any p xs

example {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) (xs ys : List α) :
    b2_any p (xs ++ ys) = (b2_any p xs || b2_any p ys)

metadata.selection_reason: custom recursive Boolean fold with associativity cleanup
